thread.title: Threads

event.title: Events
event.emptyOffline: Start Edge Server to receive events
run.title: Run Detail
wb.subtitle: Workbench
wb.sessions.label: Active sessions
wb.taskDescription: A focused planning surface for parallel workers: sessions stay visible, agent progress is explicit, and review panels sit beside the work instead of hiding behind navigation.
wb.composer.placeholder: Draft an instruction for the next worker...
wb.inspector.title: Diff / Preview / Approval
wb.inspector.subtitle: Static local UI states for the workbench shell
wb.preview.desc1: Top bar, sessions, collaboration status, and review panel stay in one scan path.
wb.preview.desc2: Cards share one blur, shadow, radius, and border recipe.
wb.preview.checkedDesc: Checked locally and ready for approval.
wb.diff.desc1: Local state wiring for tabs, commands, agents, and approval
wb.diff.desc2: Reference layout copied as the visual baseline
wb.approval.noCheckpointHint: Check the preview or request review to light up this panel.
wb.approval.check1Passed: Preview has been marked checked and is ready for approval.
wb.approval.check1Pending: Open Preview and mark it checked before approving.
wb.approval.notRequestedDetail: Preview checks or a review request will create the first local approval checkpoint.
wb.approval.reviewRequestedDetail: A local approval checkpoint is open and waiting on the visible checks.
wb.approval.handoffStagedDetail: The handoff bundle is staged locally and ready for approval.
wb.approval.approvedDetail: The local approval state is complete; buttons now show the finished state.
wb.approval.check3Open: Stage handoff when the owner-facing notes are ready.
wb.approval.check3Staged: The handoff confirmation is visible in the activity stream.
wb.command.placeholder: Type a command or route work to an agent
wb.command.noResultsHint: Try preview, diff, approval, route, pause, or handoff.
as.subtitle: Agent Square
as.nav.label: Navigation
as.categories.label: Categories
as.slots.label: Workspace slots
as.slots.hint: Added agents are staged for the current workspace.
as.topbar.title: Find the right specialist before a run starts
as.topbar.subtitle: Search, compare, favorite, and stage agents for the workspace.
as.catalog.title: Agent catalog
as.catalog.subtitle: Installable specialists
as.catalog.emptyHint: Try another category, remove the search text, or clear the local filters.
as.drawer.title: Agent detail
as.drawer.selectHint: Open details from any visible card to compare output, rating, install count, and workspace state.
as.drawer.favStateHint: Favorite state updates immediately on the card.
as.drawer.installStateHint: Install state changes the card action and summary count.
as.drawer.outputHint: Visible in the workspace handoff after staging.
as.confirm.filtersClearedMsg: The catalog is back to the full local preview set.
as.confirm.workspaceFullMsg: The workspace limit is {{limit}} local agents. Remove one before adding another.
as.confirm.alreadyAddedMsg: This agent is already staged in the current workspace.
as.confirm.addedMsg: {{current}} of {{limit}} workspace slots are now staged.
pc.subtitle: Private Chats
pc.noChats: No private chats match this search.
pc.noKeyMessages: No key messages match the current view.
pc.noSearchMessages: No messages match this search in the selected conversation.
pc.composer.placeholder: Write a private note, paste a code fragment, or attach handoff context...
pc.context.title: Thread Context
pc.context.progressDetail: {{keyed}} key messages, {{unread}} unread, and {{drafts}} local drafts in this thread.
pc.context.noAttachments: No linked attachments for this conversation yet.
pc.context.noCode: No code snippets are linked to this private chat.
pc.notice.sendEmpty: Write a message or select an attachment before sending
pc.notice.sent: Local draft appended to this private thread
gw.subtitle: Group Workspace
gw.members.noMatch: No members match this status filter. Pick another filter or cycle a member status.
gw.health.label: Workspace Health
gw.health.localOnly: Local UI state only. Last sync: {{time}}.
gw.topbar.title: Shared operations cockpit
gw.topbar.subtitle: Members, tasks, files, approvals, and sync status stay visible in one working surface.
gw.board.title: Current coordination plan
gw.feed.title: Workspace pulse
gw.composer.placeholder: Send a coordination note to this workspace...
gw.approval.title: Parser v2 ready
gw.approval.pendingDesc: Parser diff is staged, security checks passed, and sync remains locked until approval.
gw.approval.approvedDesc: Parser diff is approved. Sync controls are now visible and enabled.
gw.approval.changesDesc: A requested-edit state is visible on the review card and board.
gw.sync.title: Shared snapshot
gw.files.title: Workspace documents
gw.files.empty: No files are visible in this workspace.

pj.empty.noTasksHint: Clear search or add a local task to repopulate the board.
pj.empty.noFilesHint: Use All or clear search to show project files.
pj.empty.noRuns: No run records match this filter.
